title: Implement trigger-based heartbeat agency loop
summary: Replace the current heartbeat planning stub with a bounded trigger-based loop whose names match user-facing moments such as task end, sprint end, roadmap end, and budget end.

goal.outcome: Users can choose understandable heartbeat triggers and safe autonomy budgets instead of opaque agency levels.
acceptance: Heartbeat trigger names align with user-facing events: task-end, sprint-end, roadmap-end, and budget-end.
Each trigger maps to bounded observe/maintain/plan/work behavior with explicit budgets and stop conditions.
Cron-like operation is limited to read-only or low-risk drift/audit maintenance unless explicit policy permits more.
Heartbeat can enter a brainstorm/planning loop only when trigger, budget, and risk policy allow it.
non_goals: Do not implement unbounded autonomous coding.
Do not push, release, archive, or mutate high-risk state without explicit approval and green checks.
verification: Add tests or smoke coverage for trigger-to-action planning.
Dry-run heartbeat scenarios and inspect returned stop reasons/actions.

delta.desired: Heartbeat planning is trigger-aware: task_end routes to implementation work, sprint_end to sprint review, roadmap_end to audit, budget_end to observation. Each trigger maps to bounded mode+default budget.
delta.current: planHeartbeat accepts trigger parameter. HEARTBEAT_TRIGGER_VALUES added to types. resolveModeAndTrigger maps trigger to mode. budgetForMode shapes budget by trigger+mode. Cycles include next_task, open_tasks, and recommended_next_loop.
delta.closure: Trigger-based heartbeat planning implemented; agent can run codewiki_heartbeat with trigger=task_end|sprint_end|roadmap_end|budget_end. All checks green.
